title: Incorrect Bitmask Computation: Lost Bits in Bitwise Operations

statement.markdown: Given a binary array nums, a bitmask operation is a set of adjacent elements (including the start of the array) that are considered as a single operation. Return the number of lost bits in the bitmask operation.
statement.inputFormat: The input is a binary array nums, containing only 0s and 1s.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the number of lost bits in the bitmask operation.

examples.input:
Example input (matching the stdin format that main wrapper expects)
10111
